data.title: Mineros S.A. Q2 2026 Results Conference Call to Be Held August 6, 2026
data.description: A conference call will be held by Mineros S.A. (TSX: MSA | OTCQX: MNSAF | BVC: MINEROS) on Thursday, August 6, 2026, at 8:00 AM Colombian Standard Time (9:00 AM Eastern Daylight Time). Registration is necessary to participate in the live webcast, with interested parties advised to sign up in advance. Access to the webcast should be made around ten minutes before the scheduled call time. The webcast will be available for later viewing on the Company’s website at www.

data.title: New Analysis of Phase 3 Pooled Data for Organon’s VTAMA® (tapinarof) cream, 1%, Demonstrates Early, Consistent Improvements in Atopic Dermatitis Patients Across Pediatric Age Groups and in Adults1
data.description: Jersey City, New Jersey - Organon has recently unveiled an analysis of Phase 3 pooled data for VTAMA (tapinarof) cream, 1%, demonstrating early and consistent improvements in eczema patients across various age groups. This analysis presents promising results for the medication, showcasing its effectiveness in treating eczema. This is a significant development in the field of dermatology, highlighting the potential of VTAMA cream in providing relief to individuals suffering from eczema.

data.title: Cotality recognized in Insurance Business's Global 5-Star Technology and Software Providers 2026
data.description: A prominent global provider of property information, analytics, and data solutions, Cotality™, has been acknowledged in Insurance Business's Global 5-Star Technology and Software Providers 2026 report. The recognition emphasizes Cotality's efforts in integrating underwriting, claims, and restoration processes into a seamless workflow. Specifically noted in the Claims Management segment, Cotality's Claims Workspace™ solution garnered acclaim for its comprehensive approach aimed at serving as a unified platform to facilitate these operations.

data.title: Swiss Private Bank Makes First Investment Into Mbanq’s Newly Launched Note Listed on Düsseldorf Stock Exchange
data.description: Zurich - Mbanq, a U.S.-based provider of banking infrastructure and embedded finance technology, revealed that its new institutional funding initiative has secured its first investment from a prominent Swiss private bank. This investment signifies a significant advancement in Mbanq's institutional funding capacity and bolsters the further growth of the company's lending and Earned Wage Access (EWA) platform. Earned Wage Access has gained traction as a convenient financial solution.

data.title: Groupe SEB Is Scaling Up Its U.S. Hospitality Business with Expansion of SEB Professional Culinary Division
data.description: A prominent company in cookware, small domestic appliances, and professional coffee, Groupe SEB, has revealed plans to grow its U.S. professional division.

data.title: Odos Protocol shutting down, users have until July 30 to withdraw assets; team gave no reason for closure.
data.description: The Odos Protocol has announced its closure on July 30, giving users a seven-day window to withdraw their assets. The team has not disclosed the specific reason for this decision.

data.title: FangDD Received Nasdaq Notification Regarding Minimum Bid Price Requirement
data.description: Shenzhen-based Fangdd Network Group Ltd. (Nasdaq: DUO) recently disclosed that it received a notification from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on July 22, 2026, stating that the Company is not meeting the minimum bid price requirement outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). This violation was due to the bid price of FangDD's Class A ordinary shares staying below US$1 per share for 30 consecutive business days from June 8 to July 21, 2026.

data.title: Liberty Global Reports Q2 2026 Results
data.description: Positive operational outcomes have been reported along with ongoing advancements toward the separation of Ziggo Group by 2027.

data.title: Amwell® to report second quarter 2026 operating results
data.description: On July 24, 2026, Boston-based company Amwell ® (NYSE: AMWL), which offers a comprehensive SaaS-based software platform for technology-enabled healthcare, is set to announce its second quarter 2026 operating performance after the stock market closes on Tuesday, August 4. This update will provide insights into the company's financial viability and growth during this quarter.

data.title: DigitalOcean Reduces Leverage with No Effective Dilution and Minimal Cash Usage, Creating Additional Capacity to Fuel Growth
data.description: In BROOMFIELD, Colo., DigitalOcean Holdings, Inc. disclosed the completion of a private repurchase (the “Repurchase”) worth about $472 million of its 0.00% convertible senior notes maturing in 2030 (the “2030 Convertible Notes”). This included a registered direct offering of common stock shares to 2030 Convertible Notes holders involved in the Repurchase (the “Registered Direct Offering”). DigitalOcean is known as the AI-Native Cloud designed for inference and agentic workloads.

data.title: New HarrisX Survey: Amid Growing Economic Pressures, Americans Overwhelmingly View Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) as a Smart Financial Tool
data.description: In Washington, a recent survey conducted by HarrisX on behalf of the Financial Technology Association shows that American consumers consider Buy Now Pay Later "Pay in 4" plans as a responsible financial tool. The survey indicated that 91% of "Pay in 4" users and 77% of U.S. adults see these plans as a favorable alternative to high-interest credit cards. This data suggests a widespread belief in the positive impact of such plans on American consumers, especially during economic challenges.

data.title: Tricentis Leads for Worldwide Automated Software Quality (ASQ) 2025 Market Share
data.description: Tricentis, based in Austin, Texas, has emerged as the leader in global Automated Software Quality revenue in CY 2025, surpassing all competitors in market share, as reported by IDC.

data.title: Lamb Weston Announces Q4 and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Results; Company Delivered Net Sales and Adjusted EBITDA Exceeding High End of Guidance and Advanced Focus to Win Strategy
data.description: The publicly traded company Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) based in Eagle, Idaho, released its financial results for the fiscal fourth quarter and full year of 2026, along with its outlook for fiscal 2027. CEO Mike Smith stated that the past year was a crucial turning point for the company, surpassing its financial projections due to strong sales and profitability, particularly driven by increased volume in North America. However, challenges such as disruptions in the Middle East and rising input costs have impacted operations. Lamb Weston reported positive growth in key figures for the mentioned periods, positioning the company for continued success in the upcoming fiscal year.

data.title: Lamb Weston Holdings Announces Quarterly Dividend
data.description: EAGLE, Idaho-- The Board of Directors of Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.38 per share of Lamb Weston common stock. The dividend is set to be paid on September 4, 2026, to shareholders of record as of August 7, 2026. Lamb Weston, a prominent provider of frozen potato products globally, has been a pioneer in the industry for over 75 years, offering innovative solutions to restaurants and retailers.

data.title: Infinity Natural Resources Announces Second Quarter 2026 Results Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
data.description: MORGANTOWN, West Virginia--Infinity Natural Resources, Inc. (NYSE: INR) revealed plans to disclose its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2026 on August 10, 2026, post-market closure. Following this, a conference call will be held on August 11, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time by the management to analyze the outcomes. To join the conference call, interested individuals can sign up at https://events.q4inc.com/attendee/627523741 or call +1 585 542 9983 (U.S. Local).
